name: cdxmcpfix
description: Read-only MCP startup and config checks for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose MCP startup and config problems without editing files.
interface.longDescription: CDXMCPFix reviews Codex MCP config and checks command-based MCP server startup without editing files.
interface.defaultPrompt: Diagnose my Codex MCP configuration with CDXMCPFix.
